task.raw_text: Template kernel for domain Tech and role cognition.

law_of_law.description: Cognition must obey canonical UBI laws and AMOS_CORE behaviour constraints.

rule_of_2.description: Always hold an implement_path and a halt_or_restructure_path for any design decision.

rule_of_4.description: Map each design across biological, logical, systemic and planetary axes.
